Class MaintenanceMsg

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.gtnet.model.msg.MaintenanceMsg
All Implemented Interfaces:
IMsgDetails, Serializable
@DateRange(start="fromDateTime", end="toDateTime") public class MaintenanceMsg extends Object implements IMsgDetails
Payload for maintenance window announcements (GT_NET_MAINTENANCE_ALL_C). This message is broadcast to all domains that have active data exchange agreements with this server. It informs consumers that the server will be unavailable during the specified time window, allowing them to adjust their data fetching strategies accordingly. Upon receiving this message, consumers should:
  • Update the sender's lastpriceServerState to SS_MAINTENANCE
  • Skip querying this provider during the maintenance window
  • Optionally display a notification to administrators
See Also:
